home.heroSubtitle: Browse hundreds of local jobs across Mozambique and Mexico.
home.heroBody: Discover public listings designed for {country}. Search active opportunities, review the latest roles, and reach local talent fast.
home.featuredListingHelper: Promote urgent roles with a premium highlighted card and top-of-page placement.
home.noJobs: No jobs posted yet — be the first to post!
home.noJobsHint: Be the first — post a job and reach local talent.

jobsList.title: Browse public jobs in {country}
jobsList.subtitle: Search by title, company, or location. Filter to remote roles and control result size for a faster hiring workflow.
jobsList.jobsFound: {count, plural, =0 {No jobs found} one {# job found} other {# jobs found}}
jobsList.featuredSeparate: Featured jobs stay separate from the main feed.

jobGrid.emptyBody: No jobs matched your filters yet.

jobs.noApplication: Application details will be shared by the employer.
jobs.reportSubtitle: Share why this listing should be reviewed by the moderation team.
jobs.reportPlaceholder: Spam, misleading salary, duplicate post, or policy issue…
jobs.reportThanks: Thanks. The report has been submitted for review.
jobs.deleteConfirm: Delete this listing? This cannot be undone.

jobForm.remoteLabel: This role can be performed remotely.
jobForm.anonNote: Anonymous submissions require reCAPTCHA verification before posting.
jobForm.authNote: Signed-in employers can edit later from the job detail view.
jobForm.successCreated: Job listing submitted. It will appear once approved.
jobForm.validationContact: Add a contact email or contact point.
jobForm.validationSalary: Maximum salary should be greater than the minimum.
jobForm.genericError: Something went wrong while saving your listing.
jobForm.authRequiredBody: You need to sign in with the listing owner account before editing this job.

postJob.title: Post a job in {country}
postJob.subtitle: Add a market-specific public listing with salary guidance, rich-text detail, optional WhatsApp apply, and built-in spam protection.

auth.signInSubtitle: Access your jobs, account settings, and admin tools.
auth.resetSuccessBanner: Password updated successfully. Please sign in.
auth.registerSubtitle: Post jobs, manage listings, and receive moderation updates.
auth.checkEmailBody: We created your account. Check your email for a verification link before posting jobs.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a secure reset link.
auth.forgotSuccess: If an account exists, we sent a reset link.
auth.forgotError: Unable to request a reset link.
auth.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a secure password for your Employed account.
auth.verifySuccess: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
auth.verifyError: We could not verify this email link.

account.title: Account settings
account.subtitle: Manage your profile, compliance data, and account lifecycle.
account.name: Name
account.notVerifiedYet: Your email is not verified yet.
account.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
account.deletionRequested: Account deletion requested. You can still cancel during the 30-day grace period.
account.dangerBody: Deleting your account removes your profile and job posts after a 30-day grace period.
account.deletionError: Unable to update account deletion state.

myJobs.title: My jobs
myJobs.subtitle: Manage your listings, promotions, and post status changes.
myJobs.activeCount: {count, plural, =0 {No active jobs} one {# active job} other {# active jobs}}
myJobs.empty: You have not posted any jobs yet.
myJobs.statusPrompt: Type the new status: inactive or filled

featurePayment.title: Feature job
featurePayment.mpesaDesc: Pay from your Vodacom MZ wallet.
featurePayment.emolaDesc: Pay from your Movitel e-Mola wallet.
featurePayment.chooseProvider: Choose a payment provider to continue.
featurePayment.msisdnMpesa: Use an M-Pesa number starting with 84 or 85.
featurePayment.msisdnEmola: Use an e-Mola number starting with 86 or 87.
featurePayment.pollHint: Check your phone to approve the request. We refresh every 3 seconds.
